name: Basic Mustard and Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except egg yolks and let stand for 2 hours.
2. Beat the egg yolks into the mixture.
3. Cook, stirring constantly over hot (not boiling) water until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
4. Cover and store in the refrigerator for up to a month.
LIME MUSTARD: Add lime peel and juice when adding egg yolks and follow the basic mustard recipe. Serve with lamb, chicken or fish.
TARRAGON MUSTARD: Add tarragon when adding egg yolks and follow the basic mustard recipe. Serve with lamb, chicken, shrimp or steaks.
SPICY MUSTARD: Add turmeric and cloves when adding egg yolks and follow the basic mustard recipe. Serve with ham, hamburgers or hot dogs.
TOMATO MUSTARD: Add paprika, pimento and tomato paste when adding egg yolks and follow the basic mustard recipe. Serve with seafood, hamburgers, hot dogs or ham.
